description_long: This is a trapezoidal, floor-standing bookcase with a broad, flat front and three evenly spaced horizontal shelves, plus a deeper base section. The structure is solid and robust, with a uniform matte brown finish that suggests it is made from wood or a wood-like composite. The sides are straight and vertical, while the top edges are slightly rounded, giving it a softened, modern appearance. The shelves are recessed into the frame, providing ample space for storing books or other items. The back and sides are fully enclosed, ensuring stability and preventing items from falling out. There are no visible handles, doors, or decorative elements, emphasizing a minimalist and functional design.
description: A solid, brown, trapezoidal bookcase with three shelves and a deep base, featuring a minimalist, modern design.
description_view_0: The back of the bookcase, showing a flat, featureless brown surface with slightly rounded top corners.
description_view_1: A side profile of the bookcase, revealing its narrow depth and straight, vertical sides.
description_view_2: The front of the bookcase, displaying three open shelves and a deep base section, all recessed within a trapezoidal frame.
description_view_3: The opposite side profile, mirroring the straight, vertical lines and narrow depth seen in view 1.
